name: integration_platform_update_ai_startups_are_eating
method: [PLATFORM UPDATE] AI startups are eating the venture industry and the returns, so far, are good

phases.name: scrape_vc_news
steps: fetch TechCrunch AI tag via requests JSON API
fetch Crunchbase recent AI rounds (free tier)

phases.name: dual_output
steps: extract company names + founders + emails → append to LEDGER/INBOUND_LEADS.csv as AI_STARTUP_VC_FUNDED tag
extract key stats (return multiples, fund sizes, sector trends) → pass to engagement_bait_converter.py with angle: solopreneur capitalizing on AI wave

phases.name: route_outputs
steps: qualified leads → cold email queue via existing chain_cold_outbound
